queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account influences credit default probability and serves as a key credit risk driver.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigating the mitigating impact of negative checking account balances on borrower default rates and credit risk assessment.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical evidence on how minimal checking account balances between zero and two hundred currency units contribute to elevated credit risk.
